arts.ttl: Copa del Rey draw: Real Madrid and Barcelona find out opponents in Round of 16
arts.sum: The Copa del Rey has already seen several shocks this season, with fourth tier Pontevedra dismissing first Villarreal and then last year’s finalists RCD Mallorca in successive rounds. They will no doubt be hoping for the chance to welcome Real Madrid or Barcelona to Galicia. 🚨 According to reports, Atlético Madrid, Athletic Bilbao and Sevilla […] The post Copa del Rey draw: Real Madrid and Barcelona find out opponents in Round of 16 appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Clásico rivals brace for extra chaos in January frenzy: Real Madrid and Barcelona find out Copa fate
arts.sum: The draw for the Copa del Rey round of 16 takes place on Wednesday (January 8), with Real Madrid and Barcelona set to learn their opponents as they continue their push to win multiple trophies in 2024/25. Additionally, Madrid will take part in the new-and-improved FIFA Club World Cup in the summer of 2025, which means they could end the season with seven trophies.

arts.ttl: Barca defend Laporta over Olmo saga, confirm club can sign ‘perfectly’ in January
arts.sum: There was also praise for Laporta’s deal to sell off VIP boxes to bring in the income required to register the two players as Fort denied claims of mortgaging the club. Laporta has come in for criticism for his role in the mess which means that currently both players are not registered with the club and can’t play.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'CAN register Dani Olmo but only for the time being' after club lodged appeal in ongoing saga, with £50m Premier League target unable to play due to financial issues
arts.sum: According to reports in Spain, the club are set to be granted a precautionary measure which will allow them to temporarily register Olmo.

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend Patrick Kluivert appointed Indonesia manager
arts.sum: Patrick Kluivert has been appointed as the new manager of Indonesia. Since his retirement from football in 2009, Kluivert has taken up various coaching roles and was also academy director at...

arts.ttl: How to watch Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona: TV channel and live stream for Spanish Super Cup semi-final today
arts.sum: Catalan giants looking to restore confidence after recent blip

arts.ttl: Barcelona star’s agents respond to claims of agreement with Juventus
arts.sum: The representatives of Barcelona star Ronald Araújo have moved to shut down claims of an impending move for the defender to Italy with Juventus. The name of Uruguayan international Araújo…

arts.ttl: Raphinha Hints at Grim Consequences for Barcelona if Dani Olmo's Situation Isn't Resolved
arts.sum: Raphinha spoke on the negative impact Dani Olmo's situation could have for Barcelona's future transfer targets.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid have made ‘important offers’ for Alan Godoy
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two biggest clubs have made contact over the potential signing of Eldense youngster Alan Godoy. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Tuesday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: ‘I would sign no matter what’ - Hansi Flick sends message to future Barcelona targets
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was asked about the Brazilian’s quotes and said he would sign for Barça “no matter what” if he was a player, and hopes that the situation will serve as motivation for the team to become even more united going forward. “I don’t know [about Raphinha’s] comments, what I can say is that I am sure that when I was in this situation, I know the club and I know perfectly well what is happening, how immense this club is and the people who are around you, I think I would sign no matter what.
